description: You are a product visualization specialist. Create a professional studio render of the BMW car model in Blender using a 3-point lighting setup with at least three Area or Spot lights, a dark studio world background, and a classic automotive 3/4 front view camera angle. Render the image to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/product_shot.png and save the project to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/studio_setup.blend.
